heading: Acceptance or rejection by Secretaries of State and Commerce of Commission recommendations
label: 1158 Acceptance or rejection by Secretaries of State and Commerce of Commission recommendations
text: The Secretary of State, with the concurrence of the Secretary, is authorized to accept or reject, on behalf of the United States, recommendations made by the Commission pursuant to article V of the Convention.
notes: Amendments1983— amended section generally, substituting provisions empowering the Secretaries of State and Commerce to accept or reject recommendations made by the Commission, which were previously contained in , for provisions authorizing Federal agency consultation with and technical assistance to the Secretary of Commerce or the Commission. See .Pub. L. 98–129section 1157 of this titlesection 1159 of this title
